title: Redworld Items
description: A datapack adding custom items for project redworld
body:
a datapack adding custom items for the Project Redworld by TTH-Projects

add the resource-pack to make it work: [Redworld-Items-RP](https://modrinth.com/project/h6RQI84v)

Items added:
- Redstone Cola
- Fries
- Phone
- Admin Ticket
- Ticket
- Credit Card
- 1€
- 2€
- 5€
- 10€
- 20€
- 50€
- 100€
- key
- and more

made by [ Vanilama](https://vanilama-modded.github.io/Minecraft-Tools-Wiki/)
